question: What is Salon AI?
answer: Salon AI is a done-for-you website and AI assistant package for salons and barbershops. It gives your salon a professional website, an AI chatbot that answers client questions 24/7, and online appointment booking — all customized to your brand.

question: What does Salon AI do for my salon?
answer: It answers client questions automatically (hours, pricing, services, barbers), takes appointment bookings online around the clock, and gives your salon a professional website — so you spend less time on the phone and more time cutting.

question: Do I need to be technical to use it?
answer: Not at all. We handle everything — setup, hosting, and customization. You just tell us your salon details and we take care of the rest.

question: How much does it cost?
answer: Setup is a one-time fee of $599 (regular price $1,099). After that, plans start at $79.99/month for one barber, $139.99/month for two barbers, and $29.99/month for each additional barber.

question: Is there a contract?
answer: No long-term contracts. Month to month — cancel any time.

question: What is included in the monthly fee?
answer: Hosting, AI chatbot, online appointments, and support. No hidden fees.

question: Is there a free trial?
answer: We offer a live demo of the full product. Contact us and we'll set one up for your salon within 24 hours.

question: Can clients book appointments through the chatbot?
answer: Yes. The AI guides clients to book directly online, 24/7 — even when your salon is closed.

question: Can I choose my own colors and branding?
answer: Yes. We offer multiple themes and customize the colors, logo, and content to match your salon's brand.

question: Does it work on mobile?
answer: Yes — the website and chatbot are fully optimized for phones and tablets.

question: Can I have multiple barbers or stylists listed?
answer: Yes. Each barber or stylist gets their own profile, photo, specialties, and booking link.

question: What if a client asks something the AI does not know?
answer: It politely directs them to call or email your salon — it never makes up answers.

question: How long does setup take?
answer: Typically 3–5 business days from when we receive your salon details.

question: What information do you need to get started?
answer: Your salon name, logo, services and prices, staff profiles, photos, and booking links. We'll send you a simple questionnaire to fill in.

question: What if I want to change something after launch?
answer: Just contact us. Minor updates such as hours, prices, or adding a new staff member are included in your monthly plan.

question: Who hosts the website?
answer: We host everything on Microsoft Azure — secure, fast, and reliable.

question: How do I get started?
answer: Fill out our contact form or chat with us here. We'll schedule a quick call and have your demo ready within 24 hours.

question: Do you work with beauty salons as well as barbershops?
answer: Yes. Salon AI works for barbershops, hair salons, beauty salons, and any appointment-based grooming business.

question: Can I see a live demo?
answer: Yes — visit elite.sysintinc.com to see a fully working demo salon with the AI chatbot live. You can also request a personalized demo for your own salon.

question: What themes are available?
answer: We currently offer six themes — Dark Gold, Royal Navy, Forest Prestige, Crimson Noir, Pearl & Black, and Rose Luxe. All themes can be further customized to match your brand colors and logo.
